ProjectTitle: 8801 Corkscrew Road Structure Demolition - RFB 2023-04
Summary: 8801 Corkscrew Road Structure Demolition - RFB 2023-04. Action: Approved award of Request for Bids No. RFB 2023-04, 8801 Corkscrew Road Structure Demolition to Southwest Builders Inc. to demolish the structure located at 8801 Corkscrew Road at a grand total cost of $106,890, approve a contingency fund amount of $10,689 (an amount equal to 10% of the total project cost) to cover unforeseen circumstances which may occur, and authorize the Village Manager to execute the contract documents on beh...
ActionTaken: Approved award of Request for Bids No. RFB 2023-04, 8801 Corkscrew Road Structure Demolition to Southwest Builders Inc. to demolish the structure located at 8801 Corkscrew Road at a grand total cost of $106,890, approve a contingency fund amount of $10,689 (an amount equal to 10% of the total project cost) to cover unforeseen circumstances which may occur, and authorize the Village Manager to execute the contract documents on behalf of the Village of Estero Council with the instructions that the Village Manager is not to move forward with the demolition until further direction from Council. Additionally, Resolution No. 2023-02 was clarified to correct the date of execution from March 15, 2023, to February 15, 2023 due to error
Outcome: Approved award of Request for Bids No. RFB 2023-04, 8801 Corkscrew Road Structure Demolition to Southwest Builders Inc. to demolish the structure located at 8801 Corkscrew Road at a grand total cost of $106,890, approve a contingency fund amount of $10,689 (an amount equal to 10% of the total project cost) to cover unforeseen circumstances which may occur, and authorize the Village Manager to execute the contract documents on behalf of the Village of Estero Council with the instructions that the Village Manager is not to move forward with the demolition until further direction from Council. Additionally, Resolution No. 2023-02 was clarified to correct the date of execution from March 15, 2023, to February 15, 2023 due to error
MotionText: Approved award of Request for Bids No. RFB 2023-04, 8801 Corkscrew Road Structure Demolition to Southwest Builders Inc. to demolish the structure located at 8801 Corkscrew Road at a grand total cost of $106,890, approve a contingency fund amount of $10,689 (an amount equal to 10% of the total project cost) to cover unforeseen circumstances which may occur, and authorize the Village Manager to execute the contract documents on behalf of the Village of Estero Council with the instructions that the Village Manager is not to move forward with the demolition until further direction from Council. Additionally, Resolution No. 2023-02 was clarified to correct the date of execution from March 15, 2023, to February 15, 2023 due to error
Location: 8801 Corkscrew Road, Estero, FL
